comment: Effect recipes for the highlight editor (Phase 4 slice 1). Recipes are DATA: edit this file to restyle reels without touching code. Each effect fires relative to the clip's impact anchor (seconds; negative = before impact). '{label}' expands to the clip's viewer-facing label. Intensity: zoom = extra scale (0.15 = 115%), shake = pixel amplitude, flash = added brightness (0-1).

impact.comment: Signature-card play: punch in, hit, flash, name it.

splash.comment: Phase change (DOUBLE ELIXIR / OVERTIME): gentle push + big text.

finale.comment: Victory screen: label it, let the game's confetti do the work.
